mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (user_id, product_id, order_item_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{product_id}, #{order_item_id}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.review_id = #{review_id}
SELECT r.*, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{id} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN reviews r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.product_id, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' AND r.review_id IS NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN reviews r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' AND r.review_id IS NULL

SELECT r.*, u.name user_name, u.nick_name, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT review_id, user_id, product_id, order_item_id, rating, content, created_at FROM reviews WHERE product_id=#{value} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{value} ORDER BY review_id DESC

SELECT r.review_id, r.product_id, r.user_id, r.rating, r.content, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created_at, u.nick_name, u.name, IFNULL(ri.image_count, 0) AS image_count, ri.review_image
FROM reviews r
JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT target_id AS review_id, COUNT(*) AS image_count, MIN(image_url) AS review_image FROM images WHERE target_type = 'REVIEW' GROUP BY target_id ) ri ON r.review_id = ri.review_id
WHERE r.product_id = #{product_id}
ORDER BY r.rating DESC, CHAR_LENGTH(r.content) DESC, IFNULL(ri.image_count, 0) DESC, r.created_at DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, r.product_id, r.order_item_id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at,
DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS created_at_text,
p.name AS product_name, p.image_l,
u.name AS user_name, u.nick_name, u.photo_name,
oi.option_name AS option_name
FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id
WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT p.product_id, p.name AS product_name FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} ORDER BY p.name ASC
